h9aaa6920g5847g4c86g9c73gd77d426d29db: Away. Now. You've leeched on my misery plenty already.
h63b67a32g626ag47ffg8878g52be97d082c2: Just leave me, I said. You've done enough damage already.
h843ca172g7d7cg42e6ga5cfgbaf105d991b3: You don't know what you've done. Leave me be.
hc49cf70fg5852g4c7bg942eg8204af822518: You could always just leave him.
h9db54a2eg90e7g48e3ga0b2g15c4b5a98f8f: You don't understand. You don't know what he's capable of.
h64fe3fe2g9f0bg4b4dga90egeb9a2d551366: Maybe I can help you get away from him.
h13b4d5bbgff6cg47ddg93d1gb8455e281c73: You're just like him. Everyone is, in the end.
h6c2c2915g2528g4e6agbff5g1930056fda3b: It's your own fault - you took advantage of Baelen while he was unwell.
hf7024a8fg4c5dg4394gb47fged51a59ba595: Me mistreating him. You're just like him. Everyone is, in the end.
h2926e567g9071g4ef2g9544gb1b6e64a24db: I know exactly what I've done. Very entertaining.
h8dc74c87g27b8g4be6g8221gc1cbb0034733: You're a beast - you and Baelen  would make fine bedfellows.
h090898ecgbfd4g4973gbba2ga76d071c788c: Get out of my face. Find some else's suffering to lap up.
h265cc544g4504g435bgb51bg34d519db2067: Look at that. Got my useless old man back.
h439b6270g375fg4cf4g86b6gf18fd9e52ef6: Didn't think the likes of you took to helpin' folk.
h177fa6b9gc638g49ebgb3fag13e663b6250e: His hands are empty as a hole - will have to send him back out soon enough.
h5aa8347dg8d30g4b38g8cc2gf40c06ce242f: It's a miracle he survived. You should take him home.
hf35e3c51g799dg43f9g8a12gc47348762fbe: Please. Baelen's got a job to do. We can leave when he's done it.
h0fb73c0ag1f65g4a2bgbecfg39e644b5d77d: Seems like there's no love lost between the two of you.
h199fc831g2489g44e8ga953g1d14464a5163: Love? Hah. Never heard of it.
h4570f7b7g2f13g47ddgb9a8g863faa31bb56: Baelen's meek now, but he used to be a rotten old bastard. Treated me like an old shoe for seventy years.
h0f85dc93g1cbfg474ag8abbg89e29f274e0b: Losing his mind was the only good he ever did by me.
h48a49242g5525g47dag8558ga6c9699a7350: This is dangerous territory. You must be down here for a reason.
h83404268g1b8dg4dfag97e8gb52755147a03: Collecting Noblestalk. Valuable mushroom. We've a shop in Baldur's Gate. The locals go mad for it.
h0f9f300dg49a3g4f6agb003g4b6b7d39c194: Nearly nothing it can't cure. Blindness, poison, hair loss...
h412b5f7eg02a1g408dg9a36ge811d661b7ff: Could it cure Baelen's memory loss?
h87879d48g8f16g46bcga88egadb6c806e57c: Probably. But Baelen in his right mind wasn't worth half a half of Noblestalk.
h39f3eaa4g7e8ag431eg970fg71037854ffd5: I know him better than anyone. Got the scars to prove it.
h1af2aba2g90abg419cgb37egc977d6af472d: What about that gnome, Thulla? Could it cure her?
hd14faa3ag3d37g4754gadadgd2ac9542465a: Might do. Don't know why the likes of you'd care though. Besides, helping her will do nothing for my purse.
h1f836f8agfc2fg4862g9664gf3ad6d14b0dc: Might do. But why bother? Thing sells in town for enough to make your eyes bulge.
hd5873622g0b92g44d3gba38g03adecef402f: Ah. To no surprise of mine, you're more competent than Baelen.
h587615cegdd79g4162gbb84g67e16b4423ee: Go on, then. Hand it over.
hbaa0b30bg5f8cg4431gbcd1g424653841d06: Why do you need it so badly?
h983bee0agfcc8g4304g9c7fg7aa892f01c24: We - I - run a shop called Bonecloak's in Baldur's Gate.
hdb7f0152g6a9fg4057gab58g25f14c714336: Baelen nearly sunk the shop to pay for drink, when he was of his own mind.
hb4d3348ag3130g47afg99eagfce50a5f0539: If I can put Noblestalk on the shelves, it might allow us to hang on a little longer.
h8cda2690g1ac1g415bg8438gb40435cb03d5: What will you do with it?
h84daf43bgfa74g4e81ga00cgdbb81f9b0d55: Sell it, what else? Worth more than its weight in gold to folk back in Baldur's Gate. There ain't much it can't cure.
h5719ad78g2527g4a2dgaacbg72c9b5c98480: How much is it worth to you?
h1b15dc40gaed2g4a1fg92e3gb4953fd5489d: Loads. But I haven't got anything to offer for it. I'm counting on this shroom for that.
h7e0d9ef8gd22fg4118g9b7fged1a7254aa31: Now that's settled, tell me what you're really doing down here.
h055b8516g9749g4eadg8fc1geb75af65d8c8: You're a fool to keep such a dolt at your side - you should leave him to die.
h2e255c08gba5ag45b5g811fg4bd09c59e3ae: You ought to sell the dimwit. A little hard labour could be whipped out of him.
h33a65138ga1d2g4ae2ga2d0g3e76f1dd008b: He has his uses, for now. Hauls my baggage as good as any ox, but costs me less to feed - just about.
h41f7593bg29adg4b99gacc5gb46dded6c031: I've been tempted, but wouldn't want to damage my reputation by selling on such rubbish wares.
h60f1b9degb293g424bg9c13gde62d770edbf: We'll be clearing out, soon enough.
h55ff27fdg7746g48b6g9261ge078c0348122: Unless you want to take that lump with you, seeing as you've got the ring he gave me.
hcaf6a29bgc071g4944gac17g21a8956adf38: No? Thought not. Clear off then.
h0d32e333gec1ag43e8gbdf4g2741bded536d: We'll be clearing out, soon enough. Empty-handed, of course.
h7c7b409cgebc1g4119gadb5g5759685a6996: What? Now Baelen's dead, I've got to get myself moving. Empty-handed an' all...
h61d3a241g61c6g4627g82d8g1c39d37ac4f5: What? Now Baelen's dead, I've got to get myself moving.
h39325507g0718g438dg8845g7c91ae6d5eae: You come across a Noblestalk mushroom about, you give it here. Gods know I've earned it.
h1e39723bge3cfg45ddgb0bag3fb0f53c274e: Why is a mushroom so important to you?
ha0cde063g6469g420ega440g33664202be4a: We've a shop in Baldur's Gate. The locals go mad for it.
h72c18b14g8828g4813gbc50ga80aef08ff23: No point in lingering now I've got the Noblestalk.
ha76766efgcc40g4addg864cg982a0458707f: No point in lingering. Not after you swiped what we came for.
hdc1e0fe1geae9g417cgb127gcd9ef52114ba: Baelen's got a few minutes to get himself out of that shroom field 'fore I pack up.
ha8122588gb0a2g4eabg992agf3cc74a69e2b: What are you doing down here?
hb5fc27dfg6734g4044gb7d1g13b938ae9948: Right now? Waiting for my idiot husband's return. 'Less you've seen him, we don't have much to discuss.
hbf216e86ge195g4ec4g8d55gece22a242314: A drow? Play nice, or these 'shrooms will be on you in a flash.
hb7daefa2g4d00g4d96g98e5g2c5193465d56: A duergar? Play nice, or these 'shrooms will be on you in a flash.
h0d1a50b7g0408g4e41g933fgacd563543391: Seems the 'shrooms are letting in more people every day.
h46d50dd6g7ce1g4b11gb142g8a700c80cfa7: Now, doubt you'd care to notice, but you didn't see a dwarf on your travels, did you? Baelen's his name.
h75c1ef93gf5acg4706g8e9fgebb8c8eefbff: But while you're here, you seen a dwarf around? The non-gray type. Baelen's his name.
h96cc7aabg4510g456bga9e7gdddc82586fef: You see a fella on his own on your way in? Dwarf. Baelen's his name.
h4c0b6a59gffe5g404cg95d1g0a0e0518785f: What are you doing down here?
h7e1da118gf7b7g4368g81a8gbeea737f03c3: Right now? Waiting for that idiot Baelen's return. 'less you've seen him, we don't have much to discuss.
h93710c96g549bg404ag9310g4bc78420a1a1: Right now? Waiting for my idiot husband's return. 'less you've seen him, we don't have much to discuss.
h0554d65dg20ebg49f6g8b7cge09de799ab75: There must be something else you're up to.
h88017ce4g4747g4d8cgbbefg1732826207cb: Like I told you already - I'm waiting for that lummox, Baelen. The rest is my own business.
hf1e2776egb29cg434ag87c8gc77e9327fd57: Bald. Blue tunic. Dumb as a stick.
hb058056cg1426g452fg8d5cg15afeb7edf3e: I met him in a field of deadly mushrooms. He died there.
hc76f2de0g22cfg4010g8c23g80b054c4ff80: Worthless old fool. He had one bleedin' job.
h26174a6egd6e9g4202g8483g08f724953986: My husband. Eighty soggin' years together, and he leaves me in the lurch like this.
hfbd35756gf401g4417gbd41g3bebdd40b425: No love lost between the two of you, I gather.
h00d1274cg789eg4228g8456gf6f7f2af6e8a: Love? Hah. Never heard of it.
h9dd4867cg7aa1g40f9g9972gb2f5fd706191: Baelen was a rotten old bastard. Treated me like an old shoe for seventy years before his mind started to go - softened him up, made him realise how much he needed me.
hd2780399gd56bg4c61g8342g1fceb35de5fb: Losing his mind was the only good he ever did by me.
heb22c13fg299eg48bbg80a4g8dbfe2dc712d: What are you doing down here?
hff4efb00gd155g45fcg8397g4d968efad47a: Collecting Noblestalk. Valuable mushroom. We've a shop in Baldur's Gate. The locals go mad for it.
h898ace94gca14g4d7cg932dg786da19673a0: Ah. To no surprise of mine, you're more competent than Baelen.
hb3bd9509g62e4g40f8g8936gb99e9c4a8228: Go on, then. Hand it over.
h4c544822ga039g4370g80d5gc9550b00800a: How much is it worth to you?
he099f230gfc35g4912g8a6fgd4c9322111e4: Loads. But I haven't got anything to offer for it. I'm counting on this shroom for that.
h290507e1g1e16g4602ga53ag0bcb5c4b559a: Thanking you. I'll be on my way then.
h8c6f0ddege0f7g401fg8ec0g22b31d8fff67: I do thank you. Come visit me in Baldur's Gate if you find yourself that way. We - I - run a shop called Bonecloak's.
hb5f43b82g3cb2g4737gb767gbcf91d0f8fdd: Baelen nearly sunk the shop to pay for drink, when he was of his own mind. This might allow me to hang on a little longer.
h99da0ba2gb048g4a9cg92f2g9c4003ef064d: Why do you need it so badly?
hb6992d9agea34g4601gb901g42f78de3c6c9: We - I - run a shop called Bonecloak's in Baldur's Gate.
h94252513g0525g4f58gb8b6g79d7c2db052a: Baelen nearly sunk the shop to pay for drink, when he was of his own mind.
h90dc8745g92cdg4166ga57fg832807c9e1a1: If I can put Noblestalk on the shelves, it might allow me to hang on a little longer.
hf0e14033gdcc8g4333ga2c0gf4dc4db83198: I thank you. Truly I do.
ha33d20b1gba68g4c25g834dg9c037531f037: Come visit me in Baldur's Gate if you find yourself that way. Might be I can repay your kindness.
h4c5257d1gb86eg4a89g9a95g8298e92c101a: You've sunk me. You and Baelen together.
h1f390b4agb56cg4bb1g8262gdb802712c124: No point in wasting any more time here with you.
h5fab442eg991dg4420ga390ga26bc1852957: That's more like it. I want you to beg.
hb1f90284g2288g446eg81a2g963825623401: Alright... please. That mushroom could change everything for me.
h5e15cddfgd106g4817g9219g87b978b806f1: Oh. Thank you. I owe you more than you know.
h9eb2ba7agdfb9g4e69g8e6dg99c4f5be561d: Not good enough. Give me something, or I'll toss you into a chasm.
h965278ccg9860g4f45g9212gc7e344089983: Stop! Fine - take this. Wedding ring from a pillock. It has to be worth something.
h050a986fgba62g49f0g94e5g644a997e62c0: I'd say it was a pleasure doing business, 'cept it wasn't. Off you go.
h67693ea9gd643g4143g9c54g6cb29c62ee18: Take the reward and keep the Noblestalk.
h9e8336b0gcdedg49a7ga5d5g399a0f0e6a54: You thievin' mudsucker! I hope a cave-in breaks every bone in your carcass!
hf8ef3f23g00fdg42a3g8308g44ad882cb479: Can't. Got nothing to give. Maybe if you came to see me after, in Baldur's Gate...
ha540338eg3d2bg45e7gbd6dgd8c16ad2a0e3: I'm a businesswoman - I know a bluff when I hear it. Hand over the 'shroom or clear off.
h6ab2b143g1d12g485eg8205gf832af887f8b: Fine, go ahead. I'll find a way to fish it back out, or get another.
hacd8568bgcb54g4cb2g867ege35a9c6e14e3: Not good enough. Give me something, or this Noblestalk disappears right before your eyes.
hc8932f9ag5163g44eega041g52a6b7e80e30: I've changed my mind. I'm keeping it.
h4c2140c2ga562g4b35g865dg38272d7be730: Wretch! I did as you asked - I hope you fall down a hole and rot!
h591cba7dgf0b4g41a7g8e8fg5a532ca781ff: Your grovelling needs work. I'm keeping this mushroom for myself.
h2c50d1d0gcd21g4643gbc9cg8ba5d1476e59: Sounds like you'll be willing to pay me for it then.
h0691cee2g51a9g4098g9f86gcbc3f62f2582: What makes this mushroom so valuable?
h6f7f63c4g8e3bg4bffgb04fg2813e8efd90e: I've yet met an ailment it couldn't help - baldness, blindness, poison, piles...
hc1a82387gf8fdg4851gb40cgcdc732d0ec54: ... and best of all, it cures my dangerously underweight purse.
h03dda686g9bedg4dbbg97e8g41d0d3adea25: Could it cure Baelen's memory loss?
h68e0f15bg2d59g404cg81f5gde9a636f2ded: Probably. But Baelen in his right mind wasn't worth half a half of Noblestalk.
h74a2815egaf5eg4deaga892gedeedcf54b3e: I knew him better than anyone. Got the scars to prove it.
hc28d1e9ege975g4b50g8653g6d038a1fd21e: There's a sick gnome just over there. Could it cure her?
hb2f2e001g9758g4b56g8629g0c116cbd4735: Might do. But why bother? Thing sells in town for enough to make your eyes bulge.
h08690d3cg787bg4d41g9c90g453a1bef1155: Using nature's gifts to fatten your purse is unseemly.
h13ad2c19g805fg486bgbe28gf4406df10674: It's a mushroom. It won't leave any starving orphans behind.
hc4a3b5degce90g4659g9797gab4bd3e9f6ec: Now my purse - that is starving. Needs all the fattening it can get.
hed95c8ecg5987g45f7g80adga789fb97573e: I've heard it has uses as a remedy.
hdeb64774g57d5g4738gba01g00f99a2c916e: Once I get my hands on it, it'll remedy my flagging coffers.
hd91fb037g6b72g4e8ag96eeg5d4a4ffab081: Nearly nothing it can't cure. Blindness, poison, hair loss...
h1241a56bg7192g4b82g8720g6736ff27fbc4: I'll find my way out. No point hanging around this den of misery.
he0b1661bga34dg4112g96cdg95c967979c78: Now that's settled, what are you really doing down here?
h6c9fd425g43d8g464bga16cg1c11222525a5: I met him in a field of deadly mushrooms.
h2b252cfag4319g4903gaec9gbf6c25fcc763: Bibberbang. That stupid old fool. He should know better.
hc06945ecg1710g411cg93ebg546bbe348b93: My useless husband. Sent him for an errand; it's no surprise he's made a mess of it.
h5c8aa3a4gd1e1g43c5gbf2bg6f1a4bd550fb: Did it look like he'd make it out of them bibberbang?
h801ca5e6g13dag424cg84ffgc07572deeb1a: I freed Baelen already. He should be back soon.
h36594342g0610g4e2fg8939g57a7e460c332: Well that's something at least. Of course that old bugger needed help with a simple job...
h95600598g02c6g4b3cg84d5gf443fd208027: Good. Gods help us both if I came all the way down here for nothin'.
hb7f0d1b5g2a66g4169g8668g6c3520ba1036: No idea. I left it up to fate.
h6a2cfe2dg6216g4e9fg8154g45c5193321f4: I'll wait a little longer. What a bleedin' waste it'd be to come all the way down here for nothing.
hbb5d9bfege673g4dd2ga18ega5c84eebe6a8: Right. Well. I'll wait a bit longer. He'll find his way out, or he won't.
hdaf58e1ega18bg4e05g8a84g109b97b2efc2: Thought you should know. I'll try and get him out of there.
h04be3911gcc02g4e27gbf27g8b8f268867f3: I could help him - for a price.
h5a48c906g5fa0g4141gb85cgbc078f957aa6: No love lost between you two, clearly.
h909a8f7fge1c9g4bb9g91cbgb9ba6b198ca3: My useless husband. Sent him for an errand; it's no surprise he's made a mess of it.
h2ce235a4g18a0g4c1cgacd2g939fab31f5f6: Knock yourself out. But don't come begging for coin if you find him.
h5c2a25b0g09dag4304g9a38gcd0d501ea07a: If you try to ransom him to me, you'll find yourself skint and stuck with a fat old lout.
hcdaab952gc49fg42beg970eg92003d79c0e8: I could look for him - for a price.
h2cce2ceega93dg41b8g854age787216858a1: Please. I know better than to promise coin to a stranger.
h77df9f66gc33ag4769ga3e4g2242ae1013aa: He'll find his own way out, or he won't.
hb1cfb0bag4ddfg4b86gbe77gd3308ed46443: Bald. Blue tunic. Dumb as a stick.
h49c23faeg0126g4934ga67bgec342987c185: Where? Ach, nevermind. Idiot's probably wandered someplace else since.
h144c2ac2gb767g422cg9467g01c1f6e8cfff: You see him again, tell him to get back here to me. He's overdue as it is.
h4b9ee2cbg73c5g4dceg82f6g5b2a1a09fef6: And his pet squirrel? He goes nowhere without that little fluffball on his shoulder.
hdbeb1a0bge7c4g4d4eg9a0dg5832c631e691: Indeed. I saw both dwarf and squirrel, in the flesh.
ha653104agd4eag4436g89ddgbad2d1f8c926: Baelen ain't got a pet squirrel and you ain't seem him, have you? Forget it.
hf7ad204ag56d5g4f93ga072gff2729e3af7d: Actually, I was mistaken. I haven't seen him.
h16c9159bg289eg4f79gab14g3a7e673a936e: Oh, an honest mistake, was it? Nevermind.
hfc87b02bg1073g4689ga09egac90de0227d1: Oh is that right? What colour's his tunic then?
h3c126837gf024g4dd5g927eg4cb3b2bbd372: Rubbish - you haven't seen him, have you? Forget it.
hdd72a946g154eg426fg8a3dg104cfa9766f6: Green. With a very fine weave.
h175fa14fg8062g4abcgbe71gfb9783bb5978: Don't know. Don't care. Don't like your questions.
hb33cd3e9gbad8g437agb9f2g4df1af5f15f8: Don't like having a sour-breath gray in my face myself, but here we are.
h6bf83136g084eg459fga278g7e36cecd5bc2: Now answer the question or find another cranny to skulk in.
ha4e2c876g4cb3g4027g8218g0a252fef687a: Watch your tongue - you have no power here.
h3ea8ec1eg2129g4c82g9775gc51a6a4274dc: Aye, but them myconids do, and they won't take too kindly to you kicking up a fuss. So like I said - play nice.
hda6377ebg0c81g470bgaa0agd0032ff01cdb: I'm not truly a duergar - merely disguised.
h13d79254g9a0ag42b1ga799g21efedd96354: Hrrm. Clever disguise as long as it works. Stupid beyond belief as soon as it stops.
h9f50a194gf4f1g4f0cg94bcgaa3e113281ee: You're daft enough to get on with Baelen. Speaking of, you haven't answered my question - seen him?
h8ac71750g5105g4fe8ga828g68571799ceb7: I'm not truly a drow - merely disguised.
hb775fd13g9283g4745ga9f5g67fef2f6bb54: I met Baelen in a field of deadly mushrooms.
hcc1bd388g006eg4894g951cge699fda41c63: Baelen died in a field of toxic mushrooms.
